brandTagline: Your academic journey, fully under control.

requests.pageHint: Suggest a feature or improvement. Your request is stored; if SMTP is configured on the server, the project mailbox receives an email and can reply to you directly (Reply-To: your account email).
requests.messagePh: Context, use cases, priority, UI ideas…
requests.validation: Please fill in both subject and details.
requests.successQueued: Request saved on the server. Email is not configured yet; requests are kept in the database.
requests.hintSmtpHost: Request saved. SMTP_HOST is missing in .env — add it (e.g. smtp.gmail.com), restart the server, try again.
requests.hintSmtpPassword: Request saved. SMTP_PASS is empty in .env — for Gmail use an App Password, save, restart the server, try again.
requests.hintSmtpFailed: Request saved, but sending email failed (SMTP error). Check .env and the server terminal for details.

auth.verifyEmailSent: Account created. We sent you an email with a link to confirm your address. Check your inbox (and spam) and open the link before signing in.
auth.verifyEmailNotSent: We could not send the email (SMTP missing or error). Configure SMTP in the server .env; from the login screen you can use “Resend confirmation email”.
auth.emailNotVerified: Confirm your email address before signing in. Check your inbox or use “Resend confirmation email”.
auth.resendSent: If the account exists and is still unconfirmed, check your inbox for the new link.
auth.resendNeedEmail: Enter your email in the field above before resending.
auth.verifyFailed: This confirmation link is invalid or expired. You can register again or request a new link from the login screen.
auth.inviteCodeHint: Registration is invite-only: you need a valid code configured on the server.
auth.registrationClosed: Registration is disabled: no valid invite code is configured on the server.
auth.inviteCodeExhausted: This invite code has no uses left.

settings.pageHint: Customize your path, graduation goal, theme and language. Changes apply only after Save settings — switch tabs without saving to discard them.
settings.pageWarning: If you do not tap Save settings, the app and server keep the settings you had before opening this section.
settings.courseHint: Pick a path; CFU update automatically.
settings.cfuHint: Editable only with a custom path.
settings.themeHint: Curated palettes for a consistent look.
settings.studyColorsHint: Choose two separate palettes for exams and study plan.

trendEmpty: Add at least one completed exam with a grade to see the trend.
trendInfo: The chart shows grades and your weighted average over time.
targetTip: To stay on target {{target}}, keep about {{needed}} on remaining exams.
targetPrompt: Set a target average to compare in the chart.
graduationTip: To aim for {{target}}/110, the indicative final average is about {{avg}}/30.

manage.subject: Subject
manage.simCurrentOnly: Current GPA: {{current}}. Add simulated exams to preview the new average.
manage.simTooHigh: Not realistic with this exam alone (required grade > 31).
manage.simAlreadyThere: Already above target: passing grade is enough.

study.descriptionPh: What you plan to do in this session

calendarReminders.examIntroOne: You have an exam scheduled for tomorrow — here is a summary to help you prepare.
calendarReminders.examIntroMany: You have {{count}} exams scheduled for tomorrow — here is a summary to help you prepare.
calendarReminders.examClosing: Good luck — take it easy and study well!
calendarReminders.dailyIntroOne: Today ({{date}}) you have one study session planned. Here is your schedule:
calendarReminders.dailyIntroMany: Today ({{date}}) you have {{count}} study sessions planned. Here is your schedule:
calendarReminders.footer: Uni-Strategy — automatic reminder from your calendar.
